data.name: Wet Slits
data.detailed_description:
Wet Slits is an exciting animated game featuring a variety of sexual situations. You will have to control sex toys or girls to help them achieve orgasm and squirt. The game boasts beautiful graphics and can be truly addictive!

Wet Slits is a clicker with beautiful girls. At different times of the day, you have to take control of a variety of sex toys, help girls achieve a big orgasm and a strong squirt to relaxing music.

The game can be played in the standard mode: you unlock new levels, sex toys, and animations of hot girls.

Additionally, you can replay already unlocked levels with the camera movement fully unlocked.

What you can find in this game:

  • Beautiful animations of women

  • A wide variety of sex toys

  • Immersive sound and visual effects that will take you to a whole new level of pleasure

  • Relaxing background music that will help you unwind after a long day

The graphics of the game are amazing, the girls are lovely, and most importantly it's easy to play - it's all you need for a great game!

And now, it's time to play “Wet Slits”, if you like hot animated girls, discover new scenes and enjoy this beautiful game!

data.short_description: Wet Slits is an exciting animated game with many different sexual scenarios. You need to control the sex toys or the girls to help them achieve orgasm and squirt. A game with beautiful graphics can be very addictive!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 德文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 瑞典文, 日文, 法文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 / 8.1 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1 / 8.1 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 1000 MB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 1000 MB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
